tasks.title: Complete TRS
tasks.description: Good idea to complete TRS before submitting Appendix J.
tasks.assistance_notes: MilVector has planning checklist and timeline documents.

supporting_tasks.title: Email Company 1stSgt for TRS Info
supporting_tasks.description: Company 1stSgt will provide initial TRS info and dates.

supporting_tasks.title: Complete Pre-Counseling Docs
supporting_tasks.description: DD Form 2648, ICITP, JST, VA.gov LogIn, VMET

supporting_tasks.title: Submit TRS Pre-Counseling Docs to Company 1stSgt
Email Confirmation from TRS for Enrollment
Complete DoDTAP forms 2648 on MilConnect
supporting_tasks.description: Requires you to complete capstone and CO verification, both of which are done through MilConnect.

tasks.title: Submit Appendix J (14 mos from EAS)
tasks.assistance_notes: MilVector has a ready-to-use Appendix J template.

supporting_tasks.title: Determine Retirement Date
supporting_tasks.description: Factor in SkillBridge timeline, 21 days PTAD, up to 60 days terminal leave

supporting_tasks.title: Submit Appendix J via EPAR on MOL
supporting_tasks.description: Cannot submit for retirement more than 14 months out without a waiver.

tasks.title: Complete VA Disability Claim for BDD (180-90 days from EAS)
tasks.assistance_notes: No direct MilVector tool or public template currently mapped for this task.

supporting_tasks.title: Request medical Records
supporting_tasks.description: Request at Naval Hospital; records will be sent in about a week via DOD SAFE.  Have to do separate request for mental health records.

supporting_tasks.title: Check Out Dental Records & Make Copies
Complete Final PHA in person with the provider
Contact VSO
supporting_tasks.description: Identify what documents are required from VSO to submit disability claim.

supporting_tasks.title: Begin final medical exams / procedures
supporting_tasks.description: Depending on your situation, this could take several months to schedule appointments and see providers.

supporting_tasks.title: Obtain Final Physical Paperwork
supporting_tasks.description: Deployment Health at Naval Hospital has this paperwork; having updated medical records will help you complete these documents.

supporting_tasks.title: Complete Final Physical
supporting_tasks.description: Scheduled with Deployment Health; Required for submitting VA disability claim.

supporting_tasks.title: Separation Health Assessment (DD Form 2807-1, part of final physical)
supporting_tasks.description: Self-assessment which is required for submitting VA disability claim.

supporting_tasks.title: Submit medical records to VSO (electronically preferred)
supporting_tasks.description: Can submit initial pull of records and an update if required to speed up VSO review.

supporting_tasks.title: Submit dental records to VSO (electronically preferred)
supporting_tasks.description: Can submit initial pull of records and an update if required to speed up VSO review.

supporting_tasks.title: Confirm disability claim submitted
supporting_tasks.description: Submit as close to 180 days as possible for BDD | can still send paperwork to VA after the claim begins, but only for pre-existing conditions

supporting_tasks.title: Provide copy of DD 214 to VSO
supporting_tasks.description: Need to confirm when I am able to receive this.

tasks.title: Obtain ACP mentor to assist with transition
tasks.description: Industry leader who will serve as a mentor (12 months) as you transition.
tasks.assistance_notes: No direct MilVector tool or public template currently mapped for this task.

tasks.title: Register on eBenefits
tasks.assistance_notes: No direct MilVector tool or public template currently mapped for this task.

tasks.title: Apply for VA Health
tasks.description: This is a benefit, not insurance.  Need to add DD-214 after retirement
tasks.assistance_notes: No direct MilVector tool or public template currently mapped for this task.

tasks.title: Complete Capstone (>120 days from EAS)
tasks.description: This is an appointment with your transition advisor scheduled by the UTC.
tasks.assistance_notes: No direct MilVector tool or public template currently mapped for this task.

tasks.title: CO verification (>90 days from EAS)
tasks.description: Need to complete Capstone prior to this.
tasks.assistance_notes: No direct MilVector tool or public template currently mapped for this task.

tasks.title: Complete outbound interview
tasks.description: Located in "Travel" tab in MOL; need TRS-DD Form 2648 in MilConnect (Capstone and CO Verification need to be complete)
tasks.assistance_notes: No direct MilVector tool or public template currently mapped for this task.

tasks.title: Verify with IPAC they have outbound interview, get retirement checklist
tasks.description: Recommend sitting down with IPAC to review outbound interview
tasks.assistance_notes: MilVector has planning checklist and timeline documents.

tasks.title: Enroll in retiree medical plan (retired Prime or Select)
tasks.description: Need retirement orders in DEERS
tasks.assistance_notes: No direct MilVector tool or public template currently mapped for this task.

tasks.title: Enroll in Federal Employees Dental and Vision Insurance Program
tasks.description: Need retirement orders in DEERS
tasks.assistance_notes: No direct MilVector tool or public template currently mapped for this task.

tasks.title: Pay tricare pay premium (if required)
tasks.assistance_notes: No direct MilVector tool or public template currently mapped for this task.

tasks.title: Review / update OMPF

tasks.title: Review retiree medical and dental plans
tasks.assistance_notes: No direct MilVector tool or public template currently mapped for this task.

tasks.title: Complete DD Form 2807-1 and 2697 (medical history)
tasks.description: See Section E, Retirement Physical, for links to forms
tasks.assistance_notes: No direct MilVector tool or public template currently mapped for this task.

tasks.title: Make (3) hard copies of medical and dental records
tasks.description: May not need hard copies since a lot of agencies are going paperless.
tasks.assistance_notes: No direct MilVector tool or public template currently mapped for this task.

tasks.title: Review / validate DD-214 for accuracy with IPAC
tasks.description: Need to confirm, IPAC stated you can'd do this until 14 days prior to EAS
tasks.assistance_notes: No direct MilVector tool or public template currently mapped for this task.

tasks.title: Plan / finalize terminal leave
tasks.description: Done via MOL / outbound interview; retirement request must be approved to proceed
tasks.assistance_notes: No direct MilVector tool or public template currently mapped for this task.

tasks.title: Plan / finalize PTAD
tasks.description: Done via MOL / outbound interview; retirement request must be approved to proceed
tasks.assistance_notes: No direct MilVector tool or public template currently mapped for this task.

tasks.title: Turn in original copy of medical and dental record to IPAC
tasks.description: Retain dental x-rays, they will be discarded otherwise.
tasks.assistance_notes: No direct MilVector tool or public template currently mapped for this task.

tasks.title: Finalize allotment changes for retired pay in DFAS myPay
tasks.description: Maintain myPay for account access, pay verification, manage allotment and taxes
tasks.assistance_notes: No direct MilVector tool or public template currently mapped for this task.

tasks.title: Complete "I love me book"
tasks.description: VMET, last LES, OMPF docs, retirement letter from VA, last FitRep, last set of orders, awards, security clearance questionaire
tasks.assistance_notes: No direct MilVector tool or public template currently mapped for this task.

tasks.title: Transfer electronic files via DOD Safe
tasks.assistance_notes: No direct MilVector tool or public template currently mapped for this task.

tasks.title: Review / sign DD 214
tasks.description: Need to confirm when I can review this
tasks.assistance_notes: No direct MilVector tool or public template currently mapped for this task.

tasks.title: Conduct turnover as required
tasks.description: Have deliberate plan for turning over responsibilities so that you can focus on your transition.
tasks.assistance_notes: No direct MilVector tool or public template currently mapped for this task.

tasks.title: Check out of USMC
tasks.description: Base, Unit, CIF
tasks.assistance_notes: No direct MilVector tool or public template currently mapped for this task.

tasks.title: Turn in computer
tasks.description: Make sure you have military records from MOL / OMPF, you will not have access after you retire.

tasks.title: Receive certified true copies of DD 214
tasks.description: Pick up on EAS | Ensure you have enough certified true copies (VA, employer, records, etc.).

tasks.title: Identify if you want to do SkillBridge
tasks.description: Need to have TRS complete to apply for SkillBridge.

tasks.title: Complete Resume
tasks.description: Full resume and targeted resume; will adjust resume for each interview. Print off on resume paper (white or ivory).
tasks.assistance_notes: MilVector tools can build master and targeted resumes.

tasks.title: Complete References
tasks.description: Will only provide to potential employer if they ask for it. Recommend 5 references, 2 personal and 3 professional.
tasks.assistance_notes: No direct MilVector tool or public template currently mapped for this task.

tasks.title: Conduct gap analysis / financial assessment
tasks.description: Need to understand how much you need to maintain same standard of living. Consider property and state taxes.
